title: Neutradol Vac Sacs Vacuum Deodoriser, Place in Vacuum Cleaner Bags & Dust Bags, Fresh Pink, Multipack of 3 x 3 Vac Sacs (Original)
features: Eliminates Dusty, Stale Vacuum Odours: Say goodbye to unpleasant smells coming from your vacuum. Neutradol Vac Sacs target and destroy stale, musty odours trapped in vacuum bags or dust compartments.
Freshens Your Home While You Clean: As you vacuum, the sachet releases a burst of clean, fresh fragrance leaving your home and vacuum smelling revitalised
Long Lasting & Convenient: Each pack contains 3 sachets that last until your next vacuum bag change or dust compartment emptying.
Simple & Mess Free: Just pop a sachet into your vacuum bag, plug in and go.
Home Friendly Formula: Gentle enough for homes with kids and pets, yet powerful enough to tackle everyday household odours.
